name: rpg-foundry-forge
description: Compiles a validated Obsidian RPG vault (built by rpg-vault-guardian / rpg-gamemaster) into a playable Foundry VTT session by orchestrating the foundry-vtt-mcp server — builds scenes and mood lighting, places creature actors as tokens with correct disposition (and optional AI token art), writes quest/lore/dashboard journals, assigns player ownership, assembles encounters, and stages non-combat challenges (challenge journal + DCs + live request-player-rolls + a VP progress clock). Reads the vault as the contract (never imports other plugins) and writes to Foundry only via MCP. Idempotent and resumable through an on-disk build manifest. Compile units: encontro, desafio, and sessao.
